rag_rules: Preserve AADL component and implementation boundaries when inserting AGREE annex content.
generic_rules: Only assign to existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE expressions and their declared AADL feature types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence (e.g., init -> pre(var) + step) for stateful variables.
Use boolean expressions for guarantees, avoiding direct assignment in guarantee clauses.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope unless directly tied to an output or auxiliary variable.
